cleaned_prompt:
[visual plan]: 
The video begins with a low-angle dramatic close-up of the creator, who gazes intensely into the camera lens. A bright artificial lens flare suddenly flashes across the screen, creating a cinematic effect. 

A whip pan transition swiftly moves the camera to a rotating shot of the product—a premium umbrella and fan set—elevated on a desk. Surrounding the product are superimposed digital smoke and spark effects, enhancing its legendary presence.

The camera quickly zooms in on the creator as they firmly grip the product, raising it slowly into the air while the camera shakes violently, mimicking an epic scene from a blockbuster movie.

With a sudden cut, the framing changes to a wide selfie shot where the creator drops their dramatic demeanor, pointing casually down to the lower left corner of the frame while talking normally.

The creator smiles at the camera lens, holding the product close to their face, as the intense cinematic effects fade away entirely.

[dialogue]: 
これは、世界を変える日傘ファンセット de 登場だ！完全遮光で、熱を感じさせないマイナス10℃の力を持つ！ 
驚くべき武器、雨でも使える晴雨兼用だ！ 
あ、でもお値段は下のカートリンクから見てね、すごくお得だから！
